summary: This source is primarily an application shell for intraoperative pathology workflow, but it contains reusable educational content embedded in structured TypeScript data. The strongest migratable material is the knowledge-base chapter content in frontend/constants.ts and the guided intraoperative consultation taxonomy in frontend/data/iocData.ts. Images are limited to branding and UI assets.

algorithms.note: Decision trees and consult pathways for IOC guidance

lectures.note: Chapter-style knowledge modules with goals and reference text

tutorials.note: Guided case walkthroughs with learning objectives, vignettes, pitfalls, and reporting language
Presentation shell for the reference manual and guided IOC content
Interactive educational workflow UI tied to the IOC taxonomy

recommendation: Migrate frontend/constants.ts and frontend/data/iocData.ts first. The rest of the repo is mostly workflow UI and infrastructure, with no separate lecture or algorithm corpus beyond those structured data modules.
